case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. DJAZIA IHADDADENE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT UNABLE TO SERVE DJAZIA IHADDADENE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
